SUBJECT: Head start and a warning...


<firstname>

OK, since you are on our Priority Notification
list, I wanted to give you a warning and a HEAD
START.

First, the warning... our "Copy That Sells"
program goes live in just about two hours as I
type this - at 12 noon eastern time TODAY.

At just about five minutes after 12pm, we will
send an email to give the secret hidden link to go
claim your copy of the program, along with the 17
bonuses. 

That email will go out to 91,339 people. Remember,
only the first 51 people are eligible for that
Winner's Weekend. So there is more than a little
bit of urgency here (to put it mildly.)

OK, now on to the HEAD START...

Since you are on this much smaller Priority
Notification list, I am going to tell you how to
get to that link about 10 minutes before everyone
else.

You see, that secret link is actually hiding in
PLAIN SIGHT. This is the link:

http://www.creatingcopythatsells.info/


If you go there right now, you will just see a
timer counting down to launch minute. I just
talked to our tech guy, and he agreed to load up
the REAL page about five minutes before 12:00 noon
eastern time.

Remember, that email to the 91,339 people will go
out about five minutes AFTER 12:00 noon eastern
time (lots of people like to send email right at
the top of the hours, and with a list this large
we have found it's better to wait until a few
minutes AFTER the hour to mail.)

So that means you will have about a 10 minute head
start if you get to that page at about 11:55am.

So here are your INSTRUCTIONS:

Go to that link and you will see the countdown
timer. Refresh that page (the F5 button will do
that in most browsers) every minute or so,
starting about 7 minutes before 12 noon eastern
time... 

I guarantee that you will be one of the first to
get the real LIVE page, and you will have the
absolute  best chance at getting the full bonus
package.

Here is the link again:

http://www.creatingcopythatsells.info/


That's it for now... good hunting!


best regards,
Bill Glazer

P.S. Don't be too overwhelmed by those odds of 51
spots out of 91,339. Remember, you are on this
MUCH smaller Priority Notification list... and you
are going to have a 10 minute head start. So
please, don't feel panicked. Here's the link:
http://www.creatingcopythatsells.info/
